title: German Quesadilla
description: A twist on traditional quesadillas, filled with gooey cheese and German flair.

ingredients.name: Gooey cheese
ingredients.notes: such as mozzarella or Monterey Jack

instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle with fermented German cheese.
Fold the tortilla in half and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the tortilla is crispy.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until crispy and golden.
Cut into wedges and garnish with fresh cilantro.
